lead.headline: Briefing generation failed — check the journal
lead.deck: Claude returned invalid output twice in a row. This is the emergency placeholder.
lead.body: The morning briefing generator failed schema validation on two consecutive attempts. The most likely causes are an API outage, a model-side regression, or a malformed prompt. Check the briefing job log and the ntfy alert for details. The article scrapers and database are unaffected; tomorrow's run will retry from a clean state.

pull_quote: Even a paper that can't be written must still come out — this is that paper.

briefs.body: Briefing generator returned invalid JSON twice.
Today's articles are still in the database; nothing was lost.
Run: docker compose logs extractor | tail -200
A high-priority notification was sent to the configured topic.
Tomorrow's 08:10 run retries from scratch — no manual intervention needed.

data_point.context: Number of consecutive Claude validation failures that trigger this emergency edition.

on_this_day.body: Generator failure prevented retrieval of the on-this-day entry.
